title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 24 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 24 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 24 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends, the main contract closed 682.5, an decrease of 4.61% throughout the day;Some traders refuse to sell due to significant losses. Some steel mills tended to buy low prices. PBF at Shandong port dealt 745-755 yuan/mt; decreased 20 yuan/mt over yesterday.
